purpose: Execution board for turning the Top 10 quantum attack directions from v0 artifacts into a one-year technical-resolution portfolio.
portfolio_state: stage 1z evidence hardening; B1/B7 has now closed same-envelope cone_01 phase-removal and Euler-reabsorption routes, added parameter-transfer and theta-sharing guardrails, scaffolded and rejected the current physical theta-sharing model, blocked local-only absorption for 24/35 windows, and isolated the remaining 11 invariant-flat windows into 3 residual work packets, then showed those packets share 1 nonlocal fingerprint while 0 same-envelope grid replacements pass exactly, and finally numerically local-dressed all 3 packets at max residual 4.710277376051325e-16 while preserving 0 accepted occurrence removal because the dressing parameters remain off-grid and resource-unaccepted; T-B1-004s then projects those dressings to the pi/4 grid and gets 0/3 exact passes, projected residuals 0.3000-0.8416, 3 distinct grid signatures, and 26 off-grid local dressing parameters, so the direct rounding/shared-signature route is rejected; T-B1-004t checks 331,776 local Clifford dressings per packet and gets 0/3 exact packets, closing the plain local Clifford route; T-B1-004u then checks 143,327,232 single-carrier local dressing candidates and exactifies all 3 flat packets with residuals 3.20e-16-4.68e-16, but one arbitrary local carrier remains per packet and accepted reduction stays 0; T-B1-004v then applies the occurrence ledger and shows carrier exactification is replacement rather than removal, with 11 inserted carrier occurrences for 11 original flat occurrences, net arbitrary-occurrence delta 0, accepted reduction 0, and a 19-occurrence gap even under full carrier absorption; T-B1-004w then rejects natural carrier coalescence with 3 distinct signatures, 0 cross-pattern shareable signatures, largest signature 8 occurrences, and only 160 optimistic proxy-T reuse; the cost-model route remains 6/8 passed and 2/8 failed, with B7 accepted reduction still 0; B2 remains a hardware-like leakage negative boundary, and B10 remains a denominator-boundary track; T-B1-004x then checks native rotation inventory and finds only 2/3 carrier patterns have inventory/same-target angle matches, flat_pattern_02 has no inventory-angle match, 0/3 patterns have line-local absorption candidates, and accepted reduction remains 0; T-B1-004y then checks neighborhood/commutation pressure and finds that only flat_pattern_01 has a radius-16/blocker-free same-target candidate, flat_pattern_02 has no same-target match, flat_pattern_03 is 99 lines away, and accepted reduction remains 0

decision_rules.monthly_keep_rule: Keep a direction only if the next 30-day artifact can falsify or improve a concrete claim.
decision_rules.merge_rule: Merge directions when their validation stack is shared, such as B4 plus B8 or B1 plus B7.
decision_rules.technical_gate_rule: Do not promote a direction into publication, patent, financing, or productization work until it has a reproduced baseline, a measurable delta, and an explicit limitation section.
decision_rules.replacement_rule: Replace a Top 10 direction with a Tier 2 candidate if two consecutive monthly gates fail without producing a useful negative result.

directions.title: Hardware-aware quantum circuit compression
directions.strongest_evidence: Virtual-SWAP elimination removes 481 routed SWAPs and 1443 CX gates; control-RZ commute plus U3 phase factoring gives additional T-resource proxy reductions with 0/30 Aer failures; the gcm_h6 target selector counts 270 arbitrary decimal rotations; cone-feasibility isolates cone_01 with 35 pair-local single-arbitrary windows; phase-removal and Euler-reabsorption restricted gates both produce 0 exact-pass windows. The parameter-transfer gate shows all 35 windows have nonzero RY sensitivity, 0 are pi/4-grid exact, and 4 theta groups cover the windows; the theta-sharing ledger gate records 31 duplicate theta occurrences and 620 optimistic cache-reuse proxy-T units, but accepted occurrence-ledger reduction is 0; the shared-theta object gate defines 4 object proposals covering all 35 windows; the replay-verifier gate checks 4/4 objects and 35/35 occurrences against source QASM and parameter-transfer groups with 0 mismatches; the logical layout/routing gate assigns all 35 occurrence route packets with total/max logical hops 139/11; the factory-amortization gate accounts for 35 baseline synthesis requests collapsing to 4 shared-object requests with gross 620 proxy-T pressure delta; the shared-error budget gate allocates 1e-6 aggregate synthesis-error budget across 4 correlation groups; the independent-baseline gate confirms 0 double-counted occurrences and 0 double-counted proxy-T pressure; the refreshed-B7-ledger gate explicitly rejects the current shared-theta model; the physical cost-model gate remains 6/8 passed and 2/8 failed, so accepted B7 reduction remains 0. The local-equivalence invariant gate shows 24/35 windows are invariant-sensitive and 24 mismatch the nearest pi/4-grid invariant, while 11 remain invariant-flat; no B7 resource saving is counted. The flat-pattern KAK packet shows those 3 residual groups share 1 nonlocal fingerprint and have 3/3 nearest-grid nonlocal matches, while the local-dressing search matches all 3 packets numerically at max residual 4.710277376051325e-16 but keeps accepted occurrence removal at 0 because the local dressing is off-grid and unaccounted. The dressing-absorption gate projects the 3 numerical dressings to the pi/4 grid and gets 0/3 exact passes, projected residuals 0.3000-0.8416, 3 distinct grid signatures, 26 off-grid local dressing parameters, and 0 single-parameter snap exact passes. The local Clifford dressing gate checks 331,776 left/right local Clifford dressings per packet and finds 0/3 exact packets, with best residual range 0.2125-0.3644; accepted occurrence removal remains 0.  T-B1-004u then checks 143,327,232 single-carrier local dressing candidates across theta/delta-derived carriers, X/Y/Z axes, partner/target roles, side placement, and pair-local Clifford wrappers; it exactifies all 3 flat packets with residuals 3.20e-16-4.68e-16, but one arbitrary local carrier remains per packet, so accepted occurrence removal and accepted proxy-T reduction remain 0. T-B1-004v then consumes the exact single-carrier packets and applies an occurrence ledger: 3 unique carrier signatures cover 11 flat occurrences, per-occurrence carrier insertion is 11 for 11 originals, net arbitrary-occurrence delta is 0, optimistic template reuse is 160 proxy-T but unaccepted, and even full carrier absorption would remove at most 11 occurrences and still miss the B7 target by 19 occurrences; accepted occurrence removal and accepted proxy-T reduction remain 0. T-B1-004w then checks carrier shareability/coalescence: the 11 covered occurrences still split into 3 distinct carrier signatures, cross-pattern shareable signature count is 0, the largest signature covers 8 occurrences, optimistic reuse is only 160 proxy-T and does not clear the 600 proxy-T target, and even accepting all carrier objects would still miss the B7 target by 19 occurrences; accepted occurrence removal and accepted proxy-T reduction remain 0. T-B1-004x then checks carrier absorption inventory against the native optimized gcm_h6 rotation-argument inventory: 2049 rotation arguments, 2/3 carrier patterns have inventory and same-target angle matches, flat_pattern_02 has no inventory-angle match, 0/3 patterns have line-local absorption candidates, and accepted absorption/occurrence/proxy-T/B7 reduction remains 0. T-B1-004y checks carrier neighborhood/commutation candidates: 2/3 patterns have same-target inventory matches, but 0/3 have radius-4 candidates, only flat_pattern_01 has a radius-16/blocker-free candidate, flat_pattern_02 has no same-target match, flat_pattern_03 nearest same-target match is 99 lines away, and accepted reduction remains 0.
directions.30_day_gate: Convert the T-B1-004u/v/w single-carrier exact packets into replayable occurrence-removing semantic certificates, or produce a broader cone_01 occurrence-removing certificate set covering at least 30 windows; the 3 invariant-flat residual packets remain bounded subproblems, but savings require a stronger carrier absorption/sharing/removal certificate than natural coalescence, at least 19 additional occurrence certificates, or accepted CM-08 physical-model evidence. Defeat T-B1-004x with line-local or replayable carrier absorption evidence before counting any inventory-angle match as a resource delta. The next route must now beat both T-B1-004x and T-B1-004y with line-local, commutation-certified, semantic-replay, or broader occurrence-removing evidence; nearby same-target inventory matches alone are insufficient.
directions.next_artifact: A carrier-resolved cone_01 certificate: replayable occurrence-removing rewrites that absorb/share/remove the 3 single-carrier packets despite T-B1-004w shareability failure, plus enough additional windows to reach 30 occurrences, or accepted physical-model evidence that makes a refreshed B7 ledger accept nonzero proxy-T reduction. Next artifact should either prove line-local/replayable carrier absorption beyond T-B1-004x or abandon carrier inventory matching as a B7 route. The next route must now beat both T-B1-004x and T-B1-004y with line-local, commutation-certified, semantic-replay, or broader occurrence-removing evidence; nearby same-target inventory matches alone are insufficient.
directions.kill_condition: Demote if reductions disappear on a broader benchmark family or if certificate generation cannot scale beyond local rewrite evidence.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until B1 passes its technical gate; likely future route is certified hardware-aware circuit compression.

directions.title: Low-overhead quantum error-correcting codes
directions.strongest_evidence: Stim/PyMatching baseline plus closed reduced-round artifact boundary; leakage-erasure proxy/stress rows; posterior calibration; posterior-weighted risk ledger; T-B2-008 decoder-input contract gate; T-B2-009a per-shot trace packet; T-B2-009b posterior-likelihood injection gate; T-B2-009c DEM-informed detector-to-edge semantics gate; and T-B2-009d hardware-like leakage observation model gate. The latest gate consumes 3 strict challenge rows across 3 observation profiles / 1728 profile-shots with 864 holdout profile-shots; best conservative hardware-like profile failure delta is 0 with 0 changed predictions, and holdout failure delta is also 0, so holdout improvement fails and route demotion remains recommended.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace the hardware-like leakage observation model with real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independent hardware traces, then require holdout improvement plus all-challenge non-regression.
directions.next_artifact: B2 T-B2-009e real calibrated leakage/flag observation packet or independently supplied hardware-trace decoder gate.
directions.kill_condition: Keep the leakage-erasure route demoted if calibrated or hardware-derived posterior injection still fails to improve holdout strict challenge rows without introduced failures, or if strict high-purity/all-profile survival remains zero/false.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until B2 shows Wilson-bounded target-volume reduction under shot-conditioned or calibrated leakage/erasure evidence, without relying on the closed reduced-round artifact.
directions.kill_or_merge_condition: Keep the leakage-erasure route demoted if calibrated or hardware-derived posterior injection still fails to improve holdout strict challenge rows without introduced failures, or if strict high-purity/all-profile survival remains zero/false.

directions.title: Quantum algorithms for molecular reaction dynamics
directions.strongest_evidence: T-B3-011 cross-molecule UCC/ADAPT pressure/demotion boundary: H2/LiH/H2O/N2 bounded high-coefficient sampled covariance pressure has 35 sampled groups total, 384 shots/group, mean/max variance error 0.0833/0.5029, max optimizer-loop shots lower bound 475,043,013,690,000, max optimizer-loop 2Q lower bound 281,225,464,104,480,000, and denominator wins remain 0.
directions.30_day_gate: Do not continue B3 as a breakthrough candidate unless a rescue-only T-B3-012 proposes real multi-parameter UCCSD/ADAPT covariance or stronger-than-QWC measurement with a credible denominator win path.
directions.next_artifact: B3 T-B3-012 rescue-only multi-parameter covariance/measurement report, or B3 negative-boundary note for B10-T1.
directions.kill_condition: Keep current one-parameter UCC/ADAPT + QWC route demoted; kill further B3 work without a concrete rescue mechanism.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until resource estimates become source-backed and reaction-specific.

directions.title: Verifiable quantum advantage protocols
directions.strongest_evidence: Toy hidden-trap protocol plus shared B4/B8 CNOT hidden-projection refresh proxy: 192 configs, honest completeness 1.0, no-refresh high-leakage soundness 0.675, repaired high-leakage soundness 0.0. T-B4-002a adds 36 OpenQASM 3 randomized-measurement verifier circuits with max 30 qubits and 0 Aer semantic mismatches. T-B8-003a rejects public-packet protocol soundness because a public-QASM emulator predicts all 36 packet transcripts. T-B8-003b separates public skeletons from private masks/flips for all 36 circuits, but the public data transcripts remain deterministic and classically predictable; 4/8 contract gates pass and 4/8 fail. T-B8-003c adds H plus T/RZ(pi/4) non-stabilizer challenge-basis layers to all 36 public skeletons and removes the deterministic transcript blocker for 36/36 pilot circuits. T-B8-003d then attacks the pilot with four support-aware spoofer families: exact transcript success stays capped at 0.0625, but support-only verifier acceptance is 1.0, so support-membership soundness is rejected. T-B8-003e adds four verifier-private predicate bits, reducing public support-spoofer acceptance from 1.0 to hidden-private-predicate acceptance 0.0625 while exposing one-bit and full-leakage failure modes.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace the analytic verifier-private predicate pressure gate with a formal private challenge protocol, real backend properties, or hardware randomized-measurement execution, then attack the resulting non-public transcript.
directions.next_artifact: Formal private challenge protocol or real-backend/hardware transcript gate with learned/generative spoofer attack.
directions.kill_condition: Merge into B8 if circuit-level hardness remains absent beyond property-testing proxies.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until paired B4/B8 work moves beyond CNOT/projection proxy into hardware-executable hidden challenges with soundness assumptions.

directions.title: Strongly correlated matter via hybrid quantum-tensor solvers
directions.strongest_evidence: Same 9 B10 D5 Hubbard rows have oracle/non-oracle embedding denominators, seeded MPS pressure, one-site MPS/ALS, two-site finite-DMRG-style pressure, readiness and smoke gates, and T-B5-006b same-access production contract. Readiness passes 0/8, smoke passes 0/9 rows, and the production contract passes only 2/10 gates with no production DMRG, no oracle, and no positive route.
directions.30_day_gate: Turn the production-contract failure into mature canonical-environment production DMRG/MPS with convergence and cost ledgers, or compare a fully costed quantum impurity/response kernel against the full D5 denominator ladder under the same access contract.
directions.next_artifact: T-B5-006 production DMRG/MPS or same-access response-kernel artifact satisfying T-B5-006b.
directions.kill_condition: Demote any B5 positive route if production DMRG/MPS or equivalent tensor denominator remains stronger under the same access and response contract.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until a real hybrid baseline beats a classical proxy on a meaningful model.

directions.title: High-temperature superconductivity search
directions.current_maturity: T-B6-003 structural/electronic proxy boundary: 38 records / 22 families / 12 expanded negatives; structural AP@12 0.611 vs formula AP@12 0.10, but family-prior AP@12 remains 1.0; post-split structural AP 0.690 vs family-prior 0.982; top-12 negative controls 3; no discovery, mechanism, DFT, crystallographic database, or computed-observable claim.
directions.strongest_evidence: The structural/electronic proxy improves over formula-only descriptors and exposes explicit negative-control pressure, but it does not beat family-prior leakage.
directions.30_day_gate: Replace curated proxy channels with real crystallographic, DFT, or B5-computed observables and expand post-2008 negatives until family priors cannot saturate.
directions.next_artifact: B6 crystallographic/DFT/B5-observable descriptor table with family-prior and negative-control audit.
directions.kill_condition: Demote B6 ranking if real structural/electronic observables still fail to beat family priors or continue promoting parent/negative-control materials.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until computed descriptors and leakage controls support a mechanism-aware ranking claim on a larger retrospective table.

directions.title: Architecture-level fault-tolerance co-design
directions.strongest_evidence: B1/B2 bridge gives 1.195x-1.616x; workload-DAG factory schedule gives mean 1.475x; FT synthesis ledger exposes gcm_h6 as the current min row at 1.086008x; w8_21 negative searches total 43480 optimizer runs with 0 exact four-arbitrary-angle replacements and 0 ledger removal; template-priority gate over 12 retained templates shows 0 one-angle single-template routes clear gcm_h6; B1-side cone_01 phase-removal and Euler-reabsorption gates show same-envelope routes have 0 exact-pass windows; the parameter-transfer gate shows theta must be carried/shared/eliminated with certificates; the theta-sharing ledger gate shows 620 optimistic cache-reuse proxy-T units still count as 0 occurrence-ledger reduction; the shared-theta object gate defines 4 object proposals covering 35 windows; the replay-verifier gate checks 4/4 objects and 35/35 occurrences with 0 mismatches; the logical layout/routing gate emits 35 route packets with total/max logical hops 139/11; the factory-amortization gate accounts for 35-to-4 synthesis-request sharing; the shared-error budget gate allocates 1e-6 aggregate synthesis-error budget across 4 correlation groups; the independent-baseline gate confirms 0 double-counted occurrences and 0 double-counted proxy-T pressure; the refreshed-B7-ledger gate rejects the current model; and the cost-model gate remains not accepted at 6/8 gates passed, 2/8 failed. The local-equivalence invariant gate blocks local-only absorption for 24 windows but leaves 11 invariant-flat windows, so the 30-window B7 target remains uncleared. The invariant-flat residual gate then shows the remaining 11 windows form 3 work packets, but can cover only 11/30 required occurrence removals and leave 19 occurrences / 380 proxy-T missing. The flat-pattern KAK packet further shows those 3 packets share 1 nonlocal fingerprint with 3/3 nearest-grid nonlocal matches, and the local-dressing search numerically matches all 3 at max residual 4.710277376051325e-16. T-B1-004s then rejects direct pi/4 exactification with 0/3 projection exact passes, projected residuals 0.3000-0.8416, 3 distinct grid signatures, and 26 off-grid local dressing parameters; T-B1-004t checks 331,776 local Clifford dressings per packet and finds 0/3 exact packets, so off-grid dressing parameters keep accepted occurrence removal and proxy-T reduction at 0. T-B1-004u then checks 143,327,232 single-carrier local dressing candidates across theta/delta-derived carriers, X/Y/Z axes, partner/target roles, side placement, and pair-local Clifford wrappers; it exactifies all 3 flat packets with residuals 3.20e-16-4.68e-16, but one arbitrary local carrier remains per packet, so accepted occurrence removal and accepted proxy-T reduction remain 0. T-B1-004v then consumes the exact single-carrier packets and applies an occurrence ledger: 3 unique carrier signatures cover 11 flat occurrences, per-occurrence carrier insertion is 11 for 11 originals, net arbitrary-occurrence delta is 0, optimistic template reuse is 160 proxy-T but unaccepted, and even full carrier absorption would remove at most 11 occurrences and still miss the B7 target by 19 occurrences; accepted occurrence removal and accepted proxy-T reduction remain 0. T-B1-004w then checks carrier shareability/coalescence: the 11 covered occurrences still split into 3 distinct carrier signatures, cross-pattern shareable signature count is 0, the largest signature covers 8 occurrences, optimistic reuse is only 160 proxy-T and does not clear the 600 proxy-T target, and even accepting all carrier objects would still miss the B7 target by 19 occurrences; accepted occurrence removal and accepted proxy-T reduction remain 0. T-B1-004x then checks carrier absorption inventory against the native optimized gcm_h6 rotation-argument inventory: 2049 rotation arguments, 2/3 carrier patterns have inventory and same-target angle matches, flat_pattern_02 has no inventory-angle match, 0/3 patterns have line-local absorption candidates, and accepted absorption/occurrence/proxy-T/B7 reduction remains 0. T-B1-004y checks carrier neighborhood/commutation candidates: 2/3 patterns have same-target inventory matches, but 0/3 have radius-4 candidates, only flat_pattern_01 has a radius-16/blocker-free candidate, flat_pattern_02 has no same-target match, flat_pattern_03 nearest same-target match is 99 lines away, and accepted reduction remains 0.
directions.30_day_gate: Improve the B7 minimum row only through a certified cone_01 occurrence-removing rewrite set, a carrier-resolved transformation that turns the T-B1-004u/v/w exact packets into countable occurrence-removing certificates as part of a 30-occurrence set, or an accepted physical theta-sharing/single-carrier cost model that reverses the rejected CM-08; do not count exact carrier packets, ledger replacement, or natural carrier shareability as a resource delta. Defeat T-B1-004x with line-local or replayable carrier absorption evidence before counting any inventory-angle match as a resource delta. The next route must now beat both T-B1-004x and T-B1-004y with line-local, commutation-certified, semantic-replay, or broader occurrence-removing evidence; nearby same-target inventory matches alone are insufficient.
directions.next_artifact: B1/B7 carrier-resolved cone_01 30-occurrence certificate set or accepted physical cost-model refresh; single-carrier exact flat packets, occurrence-replacement ledgers, and natural shareability alone remain resource-unaccepted. Next artifact should either prove line-local/replayable carrier absorption beyond T-B1-004x or abandon carrier inventory matching as a B7 route. The next route must now beat both T-B1-004x and T-B1-004y with line-local, commutation-certified, semantic-replay, or broader occurrence-removing evidence; nearby same-target inventory matches alone are insufficient.
directions.kill_condition: Demote if B1/B2-linked reductions collapse once physical layout, factory throughput, and feed-forward are explicit.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until cross-layer resource reductions survive workload DAGs, layout, factory throughput, feed-forward assumptions, and occurrence-level synthesis certificates.

directions.title: Classical verification of quantum outputs
directions.strongest_evidence: Hidden-invariant test, adaptive leakage boundary, B4/B8 circuit-refresh proxy, T-B4-002a OpenQASM 3 packet with 36 verifier circuits and 0 Aer semantic mismatches, T-B8-003a public-QASM spoofer gate with prediction success 1.0, T-B8-003b late-bound private challenge contract with public skeletons hiding private material, T-B8-003c non-stabilizer late-bound transcript pilot that removes deterministic transcript prediction for 36/36 pilot circuits, and T-B8-003d support-aware spoofer gate showing exact transcript success 0.0625 but support-only acceptance 1.0. The B8 stack also includes trained/generative spoofer stress, B10-T2 proof gate, restricted lemma, transcript/device-noise bridge, ideal/noisy Aer bridges, and backend-calibrated-style GenericBackendV2 bridge. T-B8-003e adds a verifier-private predicate gate: support-only acceptance 1.0 falls to 0.0625 when four private predicate bits remain hidden, but full predicate leakage restores acceptance 1.0.
directions.30_day_gate: Move beyond analytic private predicates by adding a formal verifier-private challenge protocol, real backend properties, or hardware randomized-measurement execution, then attack with stronger learned/generative spoofers.
directions.next_artifact: Formal private-predicate protocol gate or real-backend/hardware verifier bridge with leakage-aware learned spoofer stress.
directions.kill_condition: Demote if hidden invariants remain too easy to infer once challenge refresh and adaptive generative spoofers are added.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until the B4/B8 circuit-refresh proxy survives stronger trained spoofers and real-backend or hardware-executable randomized measurements.

directions.title: Quantum PCP and local Hamiltonian hardness
directions.strongest_evidence: Exact small-instance gap lab plus finite-instance failed gap-amplification negative lemma, Lean-style symbolic skeleton, named-family cluster-stabilizer width/locality skeleton, local parametric certificate checker, and proof-environment readiness gate: 18 configurations, 9 locality-preserving candidates, 0 accepted local candidates, 4 strict width-trap counterexamples, 9 dense locality traps, 5 symbolic definitions, 3 theorem skeletons, 5 open proof obligations, n=4,5,6 cluster_stabilizer_open_uniform_reweight rows where all terms scale by 1.35, exact scale 27/20 checked for the n >= 4 formula family, normalized gap invariant, certificate rejected, and readiness blocked at 4/9 gates passed because Lean/Lake/mathlib/project/theorem-check obligations remain open.
directions.30_day_gate: Create a real Lean 4/Lake/mathlib or equivalent independently proof-checkable project and formalize the open-boundary cluster-stabilizer support-size, uniform-scaling, spectral-width, and normalized-gap invariance lemmas for all n >= 4.
directions.next_artifact: B9 T-B9-004 proof-checkable named-family theorem beyond the local verifier and readiness blocker.
directions.kill_condition: Keep only as a negative-result track unless a restricted theorem target becomes precise.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until a restricted theorem or reusable negative lemma is formalized.

directions.title: Mapping the boundary of BQP
directions.strongest_evidence: B10-T1 now includes same-access bridge, response-sampler cost stress, B5 readiness, B5 smoke gate, and T-B5-006b production contract. The contract passes only 2/10 gates; there is still no production DMRG, no sampling oracle, no positive same-access route, no quantum advantage, and no BQP separation.
directions.30_day_gate: T-B10-014 must replace the contract/cost/smoke-gate negative boundary with mature production DMRG/MPS or a real same-access response oracle with state-preparation, mixing, measurement, confidence, and optimizer-loop costs.
directions.next_artifact: T-B10-014 same-access positive-route attempt or explicit negative theorem/contract refinement.
directions.kill_condition: Keep B10-T1 negative unless a same-access sampler or production DMRG/quantum response comparison beats the full denominator ladder without hidden access advantages.
directions.downstream_translation_route: Deferred until one formal target yields a source-backed restricted theorem, reusable negative lemma, or strong proof-attempt record.
directions.kill_or_merge_condition: Keep B10-T1 negative unless a production DMRG/MPS reference or same-access response oracle beats the full denominator ladder without hidden access advantages.

next_30_days.week_1: Freeze B1 proof-log report outline; B2 T-B2-009d now closes as a negative hardware-like observation-model boundary, so the next B2 gate requires real calibrated leakage/flag observations or independent hardware traces; pair B4 and B8 into one verification lane.
week_2: Run B1 on one broader benchmark family or document why the verifier blocks scale.
Upgrade the B7 dependency bridge to a real workload DAG.
Source-back B10-T1 or start B10-T2 proof pressure.
week_3: Connect B3 to a reaction-coordinate toy path.
Promote B5 from readiness-failed prototype tensor references to mature canonical DMRG/MPS or a fully costed quantum response-kernel comparison.
Connect B6 to a real or curated retrospective materials table.
week_4: Select 2-3 directions for deeper technical validation.
Replace weak directions only if a Tier 2 candidate has a clearer validation path.
